nasb.text: These were the chief officers who were over Solomon’s work, five hundred and fifty, who ruled over the people doing the work.

esv.text: These were the chief officers who were over Solomon’s work: 550 who had charge of the people who carried on the work.

cnv.text: 所羅門有督工五百五十人，負責管理作工的人和監督工程。

ccb.text: 他还任命五百五十名监工负责监管工人。
